en: order and pay on my smartphone.
So my coffee's waiting for me when I walk in.
ko: 내가 들어갈 때 커피가 기다리고 있어.

en: I f***ing love Dunkin', man.
What are you talking about?
Where else can I get breakfast and the perfect stocking stuffer?
ko: 아침식사와 완벽한 선물을 어디서 더 구할 수 있어?

en: You wanna talk real customers?
Kid, that's me. I'm like the mayor of Dunkin's.
ko: 애야, 그게 나야. 난 던킨의 시장 같아.

en: This is the face of Dunkin' Donuts right here.
Hey, you can't smoke in here, man.
ko: 여기서 담배 피우면 안 돼. 난 안 피워, 마크.

en: I'm not, Mark. I'm not smoking in here.
You're smoking in here. I'm so tired.
I was just-
It's closing in on the crack of winter. Yeah, I come down to Dunkin' every day.
ko: 겨울이 다가오고 있어. 매일 던킨에 가.

en: Grab a prola, have an extra lodge, three filaments, take a big dump.
ko: 프로라 하나 집어 들고, 추가로 로지 하나, 필라멘트 세 개, 큰 변을 봐.

en: That's kind of the routine.
I got a seat right over there.
Let's douchebaggle move when I'm ready.
And with Dunkin' Rewards app,
there's even more reason to celebrate the season.
Yo, free coffee! I got the big one.
ko: 야, 무료 커피! 큰 걸로 받았어.

en: I got a free coffee right there on the app.
What are you doing, man?
Show and tell or something? Huh?
ko: 쇼 앤 텔 같은 거? 응?

en: I'm with a little show and tell, Dunkin' Nuts.
ko: 나는 작은 쇼 앤 텔이야, 던킨 너츠.

en: Show that, mama.
Tis the season for holiday drinks.
Like her bitch. Nevermind that.
Hey, interview my buddy, Dewey, for the movie right here.
ko: 이 영화에 내 친구 듀이를 인터뷰해줘.

en: Dewey, tell me your favorite donut is.
ko: 듀이, 네가 가장 좋아하는 도넛이 뭐야?

en: I don't wanna be in there.
Come on, pal. It's the movie.
Tell him what your favorite,
how you like the vanilla nut taffs.
What? The vanilla nut taffs. Oh!
